title: Einride 首席执行官表示，货运的未来是电动和自动化
summary: Roozbeh Charli, chief executive officer of Swedish firm Einride, discusses how platform-driven logistics, electric trucks, and autonomous systems are transforming global freight, and why humans still play a critical role. He speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)（原题：Freight's Future Is Electric and Autonomous, Einride CEO Says）

title: 播客：Colin Angle 讨论用 Familiar Machines & Magic 构建伴侣机器人
summary: iRobot co-founder Colin Angle talks about his latest venture, creating next-gen social robots with Familiar Machines. The post Podcast: Colin Angle discusses building companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Podcast: Colin Angle discusses building companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic）

title: 一名黑客用割草机器人碾压了我
summary: I'm lying in the dirt. It's coming for me. Then, with a lurch, it's climbing up my chest. If Andreas Makris doesn't stop the 200-pound robot lawn mower in time, it could drag its blades across my body. Makris certainly can't reach over and hit the emergency stop button - he's nearly 6,000 miles away, […]（原题：A hacker ran me over with a robot lawn mower）

title: Brightpick 在机器人峰会上概述了通往熄灯仓库的道路
summary: Jan Zizka, co-founder and CEO of Brightpick, will outline a practical roadmap to more autonomous warehouse operations. The post Brightpick to outline the path to lights-out warehouses at Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Brightpick to outline the path to lights-out warehouses at Robotics Summit）
